compatible_devices.notes: Two independent 220/230V AC outlets: one for intake fan, one for exhaust fan. Speed regulated continuously and proportionally by temperature setpoint. Uses AC voltage regulation (phase-cutting); EC fans requiring 0-10V or PWM signals are not compatible. Available in 4+4A (8A total) and 12+12A (24A total). Temperature range 5–55 °C, IP44. Negative-pressure balance adjustable via minimum-speed knob.
